programme.title: Holistic Home
programme.desc: Jordan and Jeff crave an oasis that completely reimagines what a home gym can be.

programme.title: Holistic Home
programme.desc: Anne is an entrepreneur whose home office headquarters is having an identity crisis.

programme.title: Holistic Home
programme.desc: Nate and Emily have spent months remodeling, but the kitchen has been last on their list.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: Hosts Tyler and Rachel kick off the competition by introducing the four teams and assigning their first challenge.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The teams race through the local nursery to find the perfect plants to bring life to their budding backyard designs.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: Tyler and Rachel challenge the teams to select items to upcycle and repurpose in their backyard designs.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The stakes are high as the teams strap on their toolbelts and plan their backyards builds.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The judges challenge the remaining teams to craft and present a unique menu for a backyard party.

programme.title: Backyarding
programme.desc: The remaining two teams prepare their winning menus for the final challenge.

programme.title: Nina's Garden
programme.desc: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.

programme.title: Nina's Garden
programme.desc: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.

programme.title: Nina's Garden
programme.desc: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.desc: Margot and Josh spent years perfecting every room in the house but overlooked their bedroom.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.desc: Eduardo and Gabriela's ‘little’ home projects have piled up and they’re ready for Drew’s help.

programme.title: Date My House
programme.desc: Kayla and Ryan have a newborn and a toddler and need both functionality and style in their space.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.desc: Andrea Schumacher invites you into her Colorado home, which tells the story of her life and travels.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.desc: Designer Jennifer Farrell invites you to experience Calibu Vineyard, her home nestled in the Califronia hills.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.desc: Anne-Marie Barton invites you through the gate to this stately, traditional yet modern home.

programme.title: The Reveal
programme.sub-title: It’s a Mood: Cara Woodhouse’s Noyack Cottage
programme.desc: Step inside Noyack Cottage, a stunning Sag Harbor vacation home transformed by Cara Woodhouse.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.sub-title: Marcela Valladolid: A Chef's Kitchen on the Coast
programme.desc: Chef Marcela Valladolid gives Matthew a hands-on lesson in crafting the perfect taco and salsa.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.sub-title: Chris Scott: A Top Chef Talks Biscuits, Jazz and Aprons
programme.desc: Chef Chris Scott welcomes Matthew into his New Jersey home to whip up his legendary biscuit recipe.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.sub-title: Carnie Wilson: Rock Royalty's Infamous Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: Matthew visits Carnie Wilson's Los Angeles home to whip up her Fall-to-Your-Knees Mac and Cheese.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.desc: Chef and restaurateur Melba Wilson schools Matthew on the art of her legendary shrimp and grits.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.desc: Matthew meets trailblazers Matthew McIvor of Proudly Serving and the King of Babka, Shimi Aaron.

programme.title: Fame to Table
programme.sub-title: Fariyal Abdullahi: From Ethiopia to the Met Gala
programme.desc: Matthew meets Ethiopian-born Chef Fariyal Abdullahi and gets a hands-on lesson in creating Doro Wat.

programme.title: A-List Living
programme.desc: Matthew explores the gorgeous, guard-gated equestrian community of Hidden Hills, California.
